Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: French Kweebec seems to be in much higher spirits today. He wears a faint, pleased smile while looking over his pond, leaning back against his chair in a rather casual manner.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You can't help but notice that the table in the back is still crammed with baguettes. You wonder whether he stress-baked another few batches, or these are the same specimens from last time. Were they just lying here, exposed to the elements?

Choices.Text: I'm doing great, now that you're here. [Wink at him.]
Today has been a good day.
Doom and gloom have been my only company since birth.
